description_long: This is a wooden baseball bat with a natural brown finish, featuring a classic tapered cylindrical shape that widens at the barrel and narrows toward the handle. Embedded throughout the barrel are several large, metallic nails protruding at various angles, giving the bat a rugged and menacing appearance. The nails are silver-gray and appear to be randomly distributed, with their heads and sharp points clearly visible. The handle is smooth and lacks any grip tape or additional wrapping, ending in a rounded knob. The surface of the wood is smooth with a subtle matte sheen, and there are no visible brand logos, markings, or decorative elements on the bat. The end cap is simply the rounded end of the wooden bat, with no distinct design or material difference.
description: A wooden baseball bat with a smooth brown finish, embedded with protruding silver nails along the barrel, and no visible markings or grip tape.
description_view_0: Front view showing the bat's barrel with several nails protruding outward, highlighting the density of nails on one side.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the alignment and distribution of nails along the length of the barrel, with the handle and knob clearly visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the smooth, uninterrupted wood surface with fewer visible nails, emphasizing the bat's curvature.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing another angle of the nail arrangement and the full length of the bat, with the handle and knob in view.
